\tzpentry{ID3593}{Self Potential Energy Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3593 introduces Self Potential Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} U_{\text{self}}(d) = \frac{\mu_0}{2\pi} \frac{\mu_1 \cdot \mu_2}{d^3} - \frac{3\mu_0}{2\pi} \frac{(\mu_1 \cdot \hat{d})(\mu_2 \cdot \hat{d})}{d^3} \end{equation}
